title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.140 - Judgment in such cases
text:
524.140.  Judgment in such cases. — In such case the judgment shall be for the recovery of the premises, the damages assessed and the accruing rents and profits, at the rate found by the jury, from the time of rendering the verdict until the possession of the premises is delivered to the plaintiff.
(RSMo 1939 § 1544) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1380; 1919 § 1830; 1909 § 2397
